features.name: register array with multiple storage elements
features.description: Code should include a register array declaration with multiple storage elements and multi-bit width, used in an always block with non-blocking assignment

features.name: module instantiation with named port connections
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation with multiple named port connections, where the called module has bidirectional or inout-like signal roles

features.name: continuous assignment for comb read of memory
features.description: Code should include a continuous assignment that reads from an indexed memory array

features.name: input signals used as address enables
features.description: Code should include input signals used as address or enable controls in register array access, where the signals are also passed to module instances
